description_long: This object depicts a cluster of modern high-rise office buildings arranged along a central avenue with green medians. The tallest structures are sleek, rectangular towers with blue-tinted glass facades and white framing, featuring a grid-like window pattern. Flanking these are slightly shorter buildings with similar blue-and-white color schemes, and two tan-colored towers with blue roofs and brown bases, suggesting a mix of architectural influences. The base of the buildings is set on a gray platform representing city streets and sidewalks, with clear demarcation of roadways and pedestrian areas. The overall composition suggests a bustling urban business district, with the buildings likely housing offices, lobbies, and commercial spaces. The clean lines, repetitive window patterns, and lack of ornamentation point to a contemporary International Style design.
description: A group of modern high-rise office buildings with blue glass facades and white framing, arranged along a central avenue in an urban setting. The cluster includes both sleek blue-and-white towers and tan buildings with blue roofs, all set on a city street platform.
description_view_0: This view highlights the two tallest blue-and-white office towers at the forefront, with the tan buildings and avenue receding into the background.
description_view_1: From this angle, the tan office buildings with blue roofs are most prominent, flanking the central avenue and facing the main blue tower in the background.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the blue-and-white towers on the right and left, with the tan buildings and avenue visible between them.
description_view_3: The rear view emphasizes the blue-and-white towers, with the tan buildings and avenue visible in the distance, and the city street layout more apparent.
attribute_window_pattern: Highly regular, grid-like arrangement of rectangular windows spanning the facades, with consistent spacing and repetition across all towers.
